description: Domain invariant declarations for Digital Marketing product

invariants.name: Campaign lifecycle state machine
invariants.description: Campaigns must follow valid state transitions (draft -> planned -> active -> paused -> completed -> archived)

invariants.name: Consent-gated campaign activation
invariants.description: Campaign activation must not proceed without valid consent status from PHR

invariants.name: Lead capture data integrity
invariants.description: Lead data must maintain referential integrity with campaigns and consent records

invariants.name: Campaign activity audit trail
invariants.description: All campaign activations, modifications, and deactivations must be audited

invariants.name: Connector readiness state machine
invariants.description: External connectors must have valid readiness states (not-configured -> configured -> validated -> active -> degraded -> blocked)

invariants.name: Notification retry and DLQ
invariants.description: Failed notifications must retry with exponential backoff and dead-letter queue after max retries

invariants.name: Lead conversion tracking
invariants.description: Lead conversion events must be tracked with source attribution and timestamp

invariants.name: Campaign budget enforcement
invariants.description: Campaign spend must not exceed allocated budget with spend gates

invariants.name: Tenant-scoped campaign isolation
invariants.description: Campaigns and leads must be isolated by tenant with no cross-tenant visibility

invariants.name: Notification preference handling
invariants.description: Notification delivery must respect user preference settings and opt-out requests
